method: aggregate synthetic control on monthly abnormal returns

assumptions_and_limitations.pre_treatment_fit: SCM credibility depends on the synthetic control reproducing the treated proxy before implementation.
assumptions_and_limitations.no_spillovers: Control firms may still be indirectly affected by Pillar Two or correlated regulatory shocks.
assumptions_and_limitations.donor_pool: Only firms with complete monthly abnormal-return histories are used; missing returns are not imputed as zero.
assumptions_and_limitations.aggregate_treatment: The treated outcome is a cohort average, which can conceal firm-level heterogeneity.

limitation: Treatment is a revenue-threshold exposure proxy, not observed top-up tax liability.
